## Checklist

- [ ] `clauditor --selftest` is green
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests` passes
- [ ] Added/updated a test for this change
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (stdlib only)
- [ ] Updated `docs/checks.md` / `README.md` if behavior changed
